messages.content: please revise the sentence for me in consice. Sequence of the target site 16S rRNA U58 of the guide RNA sR435
Sequence of guide RNA sR435's target site, 16S rRNA U58.
Used for PCR amplification of Cbf5 Larm and insert DNA fragment
PCR amplification of Cbf5 Larm and insertion of DNA fragment.
Used for PCR amplification of Cbf5 Larm and insert fragment
PCR amplification and insertion of fragment into Cbf5 Larm.
Used for PCR amplification of Cbf5 Larm and its complete fragment
PCR amplification of the complete Cbf5 Larm fragment.
Used for PCR amplification of Cbf5 Larm and its insertion
PCR amplification and insertion of a fragment into Cbf5 Larm.
Used for PCR amplification of Nop10 insertion
PCR amplification of an insertion into Nop10.
Derived from E233S, carrying flag-his tag in Cbf5 C terminal
Derived from E233S, this carries a flag-his tag in the C-terminal of Cbf5.
Derived from E233S with a flag-his tag at the C-terminus of Cbf5
This is derived from E233S with a flag-his tag at the C-terminus of Cbf5.
Derived from E233S, lacking the gene sequence encoding HACA RNA
This is derived from E233S and lacks the gene sequence that encodes for HACA RNA.

The resulting genome-editing plasmid (pGE) containing a sequence cassette that can be inserted into a specific site of interest through homology recombination was transformed into S. islandicus competent cells by electroporation.

The genome-editing plasmid (pGE) was transformed into S. islandicus competent cells through electroporation. The plasmid contains a sequence cassette that can be inserted into a specific site of interest through homology recombination.
